verses.text: Topa ka phat ding hi. Topa ka Pasian aw, nang na lian mahmah hi. Minthan'na leh liatna nang na silh hi
Puanza tawh tuam bangin khuavak tawh na kituam a, vantungte pen puanbuk bangin na zal hi
Vana om tui tungah na inn na lam a, na leeng dingin meiipite na bawl a, huih khate tungah nang na tuang hi
Na kamtai dingin huihte na bawl a, mei leh meikuangte na nasemte na hisak hi
Leitung a ling ngeilo dingin ama bulpi tungah na phut hi
Nangmah in puan tawh tuam bangin leitung pen tui thukpi tawh na tuam a, tuate in mualte tuumcip hi
Na thuhilhna hangin tua tuite taikhia uh a, na thupiakna awging a zak uh ciangin kikhawhkhia uh hi
Mualtung leh guamsungah tua tuite luang uh a, amau-a' dingin na sehsa munah a tung uh hi
Tua tuite in leitung a tuamkik lohna dingin amaute' kantan loh ding gamgi khat na phut hi
Kuamte sung panin ciktui na phulkhiasak a, mualte kikalah a luang uh hi
Gamlak ganhingte' dawn ding tui na pia a, gamlak sakolte in a dangtakna uh tua tui-ah a phasak uh hi
Tua tui kiangah huihlak vasate om uh a, singhiangte lakah amaute ham zaizai uh hi
A sangna mun na omna panin mite tungah guah na zusak a, nangma thupha tawh leitung a kidim hi
Nangmah in ganhingte-a' dingin lopa, mihing in leilak panin an a ngah theihna dingin a khawh ding ankungte
mihing lungsim a nuamsak ding leenggahzu, mihing maitang a zolsak ding sathau, mihing lungsim a hatsak ding an na piangsak hi
Topa in a suan, Lebanon muala om taamtak singte, tua ama singkungte in guahtui tampi a ngah hi
Tua singte tungah vasate in bu bawl uh a, taksing kungte lakah gun vapite in bu a tom uh hi
Mual sangte pen sathakte-a' ding hi a, suangtumte pen sakikh-te' belh ding ahi hi
Hun ciamtehna dingin khapi na bawl a, ni in zong a tum ding hun a thei hi
Nangmah in khuamial na bawl a, gamlak ganhing khempeuh a vakkhiat hun pen zan hunsung ahi hi
Humpinelkai khanglaite in amau' nek ding sa a ngahna dingun nakpi takin hawk uh a, amau' an ding Pasian' tung pan a ngah uh hi
Ni a suah ciangin amaute kihemkhia uh a, a kua sung uhah a lum hithiat uh hi
Mite pen nasem dingin kuankhia uh a, nitak mateng na sem uh hi
Topa aw, na sepsa nate tam mahmah hi. Nangmah in ciimna tawh tuate khempeuh na bawl a, na pian'sak ganhingte tawh leitung a kidim hi
Hua lai-ah, ganhing a lian a neu, simzawh lohin a tam, a vak muamua-na, lianin a zai mahmah tuipi om hi
Hua tuipi tungah teembawte leh gualnopna dingin na bawl Awle a pai hi
A hun ciangin an na piak ding ngakin hihte khempeuh in nangmah hong en uh hi
Na piak ciangin amaute in ne uh a, an na pia a, amaute lungkim uh hi
Na maitang na seel ciangin amaute khasia uh hi. Amau' husan'na na lakkhiat ciangin amaute si-in amau' pian'na leivui-ah a ciahkik uh hi
Na hu na san'khiat ciangin amaute a kipiangsak hi a, nangmah in leitung na bawlthak hi
Leitung a et ciangin tua leitung kilingin, mualte a lawn' ciangin tua mualte meikhu a suak, ama nasepna-ah Topa lungdam hen la, Topa' minthan'na kip tawntung ta hen
Ka nuntak laiteng Topa tungah la ka sa ding a, ka hin' laiteng ka Pasian phatna la ka sasa ding hi
Topa in hong lungdamsak ahih manin ka lasaknate in zong amah lungdamsak ta hen
Leitung panin mawhnei mite beimang hen la, migilote om nawn kei hen. Ke'n, Topa ka phat ding hi. Topa ka phat ding hi.
